list-labs.description: Returns a list of all labs used in the course along with their tool types

set-course.description:
Set course attributes

Update course attributes of an existing course archive.

minPassingGrade.name: minPassingGrade
minPassingGrade.description: minimum passing grade as an integer

ltiPassport.name: ltiPassport
ltiPassport.description: lti consumer key and secret pair, no speical character is allowed. e.g, consumer_key:consumer_secret

policyXml.name: policyXml
policyXml.description: valid xml string to override course/<url_name>.xml

courseCard.name: courseCard
courseCard.description: path or url to course card image file. PNG, JPG.
